# Keppet Open Data

> Free, daily, USD-anchored open data for the world's currencies, metals, crypto, rates and yields. Static JSON on a CDN — no key, no server. Every value is anchored to USD, so any cross-rate is a single division — no extra calls, no API key, no rate limits.

Base URL: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main
Updated: 2026-07-08T02:03:39.149Z. Anchor: USD.
Conversion: value_of_X_in_Y = usd_value(X) / usd_value(Y); fiat usd_value=1/rate, price-domains usd_value=price

## Datasets

- [Foreign Exchange Rates](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/fx/v1/usd.min.json): 158 instruments, daily, in units of the currency per 1 USD. Latest 2026-07-07 (the day the values were actually true; may lag today on weekends/holidays). Sources: un, bis, ecb, swissquote. Schema: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/fx.schema.json
- [Precious Metals](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/metals/v1/latest.min.json): 4 instruments, daily, in USD per troy ounce. Latest 2026-07-08 (the day the values were actually true; may lag today on weekends/holidays). Sources: swissquote. Schema: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/metals.schema.json
- [Cryptocurrencies](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/crypto/v1/latest.min.json): 96 instruments, daily, in USD. Latest 2026-07-08 (a real-time capture stamped with today). Sources: coingecko. Schema: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/crypto.schema.json
- [Reference & Policy Rates](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/rates/v1/latest.min.json): 40 instruments, daily, in percent per annum. Latest 2026-07-06 (the day the values were actually true; may lag today on weekends/holidays). Sources: nyfed, ecb, bis. Schema: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/rates.schema.json
- [Sovereign Yield Curves](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/yields/v1/latest.min.json): 14 instruments, daily, in percent per annum. Latest 2026-07-07 (the day the values were actually true; may lag today on weekends/holidays). Sources: us-treasury. Schema: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/yields.schema.json

## Discovery

- [Catalog](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/catalog.json): machine-readable index of every dataset — URL, unit, count, effective date and sources. Start here to enumerate what is available.
- [Status](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/status.json): per-domain age and per-source staleness, so you can tell at a glance whether a feed is fresh before you rely on it.

## History

- The public CDN serves the HOT TIER: current values plus a 90-day rolling window of dated snapshots per domain at https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/<domain>/v1/<date>.min.json.
- The deep USD-anchored history — the full tidy long-form observation time series (one row per instrument/field/day, schema https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kod-data@main/schema/observations.schema.json) — is maintained privately and offered separately. It is not served on the public CDN.

## How to consume

- Fetch any URL above with a plain HTTP GET. Responses are static JSON: no authentication, no query parameters, no rate limits. `.min.json` is minified; the sibling `.json` is pretty-printed.
- Each payload carries an envelope: $schema, dataset, base, unit, date (effective), updated, sources, sourcesMeta (per-source effective date), and the data object.
- To convert between any two instruments X and Y — across domains — use the USD anchor: value_of_X_in_Y = usd_value(X) / usd_value(Y). For fiat, usd_value = 1 / rate (rates are per USD); for price domains (metals, crypto), usd_value = price. USD itself has usd_value = 1.
- Example: EUR per 1 BTC = usd_value(BTC) / usd_value(EUR) = crypto.prices.BTC / (1 / fx.rates.EUR) = crypto.prices.BTC * fx.rates.EUR.
- A typed MCP server (`npx keppet-mcp`) wraps these feeds as agent tools — list_datasets, convert, get_fx, get_metals, get_crypto, get_rates, get_yield_curve — and does the anchor math for you.
